actions.name: Scimitar
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12+3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or take 9 (2d8) poison damage, being paralyzed for 1 hour on a failed save.

actions.name: Web
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: The target is restrained by webbing (DC 12 Strength check to escape).

actions.name: Greatclub
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8+4) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The troll makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) slashing damage.

name: Werewolf
speed: 30 ft. (40 ft. in wolf or hybrid form)

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: In humanoid form, the werewolf makes two longsword attacks or two longbow attacks. In wolf or hybrid form, it makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or longsword.

actions.name: Bite (Wolf or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage. If humanoid, DC 12 Con save or be cursed with lycanthropy.

actions.name: Claws (Hybrid Form Only)
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (2d4+2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The vampire makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

actions.name: Unarmed Strike
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8+4) bludgeoning damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vampire can grapple the target (escape DC 18).

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or grappled, incapacitated, or restrained creature. Hit: 7 (1d6+4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. Target's HP maximum is reduced by necrotic damage until long rest.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10+6) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6+6) slashing damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath
actions.description: Exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature must make a DC 17 Dex save, taking 56 (16d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half on success. Recharge 5–6.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence, then makes three attacks: one bite and two claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10+6) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath
actions.description: Exhales poisonous gas in a 60-foot cone. Each creature must make a DC 18 Con save, taking 56 (16d6) poison damage on a fail or half on success. Recharge 5–6.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon can use Frightful Presence, then makes three attacks: one bite and two claws.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +16 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (2d10+9) piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) lightning damage.

actions.name: Lightning Breath
actions.description: Exhales lightning in a 120-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature must make a DC 23 Dex save, taking 88 (16d10) lightning damage on a fail or half on success. Recharge 5–6.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.description: Melee Spell Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) cold damage. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Con save or be paralyzed for 1 minute.

actions.name: Tentacles
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 15 (2d10+4) psychic damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 15) and must succeed on a DC 15 Int save or be stunned until grapple ends.

actions.name: Mind Blast
actions.description: The mind flayer magically emits psychic energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature must make a DC 15 Int save, taking 22 (4d8+4) psychic damage and becoming stunned for 1 minute on a failed save.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage.

actions.name: Eye Rays
actions.description: The beholder shoots three of its magical eye rays at random, chosen from its 10 possible rays (Charm, Paralyzing, Fear, Slowing, Enervating, Telekinetic, Sleep, Petrification, Disintegration, Death Ray). Each ray targets a randomly selected creature within 120 feet.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6+1) slashing damage.

actions.name: Light Crossbow
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8+1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The captain makes three melee attacks: two with its scimitar and one with its dagger. Or the captain makes two ranged attacks with its daggers.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The wyvern makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its stinger. While flying, it can use its claws in place of one other attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Stinger
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage. The target must make a DC 15 Con save, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half on a success.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.

actions.name: Beak
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10+5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8+5) slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The manticore makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws or three with its tail spikes.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tail Spike
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 100/200 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage. The manticore has 24 tail spikes. Used spikes regrow when the manticore finishes a long rest.
